titleStmt.title: SII 24.444: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 444.

summary.p: Slightly damaged. Registers a gift of three villages to the temple for the tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam of the god by the elder sister of Bhūtanāthuni Rāmābhaṭlaiyaṅgāru. The gift was entrusted to the Śrībhaṇḍāram of the temple. The details of the date viz., Śaka 1461, Vikārin, Phālguṇa, ba. 10, Wednesday, correspond to 1540, A.D. March 3, Wednesday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1461 Agu nēṭi vikāri saṁvatsara phālguṇa ba 10 budhavāraṁ śrī¨rmamahārājādhirāba rāja paramēśvara Acyutarāya mahārāyalu
ḍai pṛthivirājya śēyucuṁḍagāma . tenkarapāṁḍikulāsini vaḷanāḍu viṭṭavarāvidi (varāvidi) vaḷanāṭṭu . tiruvaraṁgaṁ tirupati perumāḷśu śrīraṁganātha dēvara śrī bhaṁḍārānaku . bhūdhanādhuni rāmābhaṭayaṁgāri tōḍaṁbuṭṭina Akkaṁgāru
va¨rthanagōtra Āpastaṁbasūtraṁ yajuśākhādhyāyulaina yaṁḍa ri tiṁmayaṁgāri komāruṁḍu malayaku
rakulu sakūlōnugānu dinaṁ 1ki naivēdyaṁ Āru taḷigelu leka Ayina
kūḍina yeḍu 1ki nelalu 12 ki dinālu 360 kūḍi varālu 90000 parālu
mālu kīḷupattu cōḷamaṁḍalaṁ sīmalōni kkalipattu mākaṇalōni pirāṁguḍi grāma
0 1 ni Aṁtugrāmālu 3 nu śrīraṁganāthadēvara śrī bhaṁḍārānaku tiruviḍaiyāṭaṁ
viḷukāḍu nāriniṁṭa nokapālu dina 1 ki taḷige yaṁtu 12 ga gavara pōri
peṭṭa kaṭaḍa cēnina nimitaṁ Ā caṁdrā¨rkastāyigānu naḍa ni yī silāśāsanaṁ vrāyiṁcina guḍikaraṇaṁ siraṁga
sūtraṁ yajuśākha karaḍiyaṟayakoḍuku boṁmarasu vrālu .
lakharasukoḍuku basavapa sadāsēva .
Digital edition of SII 24.444 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
